protein_name: Positively regulates the transcription of MYCNOS in neuroblastoma cells. Expressed in the neuronal cells of the cerebrum, neuroblastomas and thyroid tumors (at protein level). Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: DNA binding; DNA-binding transcription activator activity, RNA polymerase II-specific; DNA-binding transcription factor activity; DNA-binding transcription factor activity, RNA polymerase II-specific; kinase binding; protein binding; protein dimerization activity; RNA polymerase II cis-regulatory region sequence-specific DNA binding; sequence-specific double-stranded DNA binding
